name: Pork Chops with Cherry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 Pork chops, loin, about 1/2 inch thick
1 cup Sour cherries, pitted and pureed
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any excess fat from the pork chops.
2. Season the chops with salt and pepper.
3. Roll the chops in bread crumbs mixed with additional salt and pepper.
4. Fry the chops in hot butter, margarine, or oil until browned on both sides.
5. Add 1/2 cup of water to the pan and cook over low heat, covered, for 45 to 60 minutes, or until tender.
6. Meanwhile, combine cherries, sugar, cinnamon, lemon rind, and honey in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes. Add a little water to thin the sauce if desired.
8. Stir in Madeira wine and remove from heat.
9. Serve the sauce over the cooked pork chops.
